calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-09-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CATHERINE ASHWORTH's MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS.

1. Plaintiff's motion to quash/modify the subpoenas is granted. (CCP sections 1985.3(g), 1987.1.)

2. The Court limits the subpoenas to the injuries at issue in this case: brain injury, subarachnoid hemorrhage, left humerus fracture, left clavicle fracture, neck and back pain, laceration on left side of forehead, severe bruising along left side of body from shoulder to knee, and emotional distress.

3. However, at the present time, medical providers shall produce any and all records, reports, etc. from August 30, 2018, to the present.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed form of order.

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/BZ)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-23-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
